products.name: Denim Jacket
products.description: Classic blue denim jacket with a relaxed fit. A wardrobe staple that pairs with everything from tees to dresses. Pre-washed for that perfectly broken-in feel.

products.name: Yellow Jacket
products.description: Bold mustard-yellow windbreaker. Lightweight, water-resistant, and impossible to ignore. Zip front with two side pockets.

products.name: Smooth Cloth Shirt
products.description: Soft-touch everyday shirt with a tailored cut. Breathable cotton blend that drapes cleanly and holds its shape wash after wash.

products.name: Summer Linen Shirt
products.description: Lightweight 100% linen shirt made for warm days. Relaxed fit, mother-of-pearl buttons, and a subtle natural texture.

products.name: Casual Polo
products.description: Pique cotton polo with a clean placket and ribbed collar. The no-effort staple that always looks intentional.

products.name: Everyday Crew Tee
products.description: Premium ringspun cotton tee with a classic crew neckline. Pre-shrunk and built to be your most-worn layer.

products.name: Floral Summer Dress
products.description: Flowy midi dress in a playful floral print. Adjustable straps, side seam pockets, and a flattering A-line silhouette.

products.name: Knit Sweater
products.description: Cozy chunky-knit pullover in soft merino wool. Oversized fit with drop shoulders — your go-to layer for chilly mornings.

products.name: Tailored Blazer
products.description: Structured single-button blazer in a wrinkle-resistant weave. Sharp shoulders, clean lapels — instantly pulls an outfit together.

products.name: Pleated Midi Skirt
products.description: Satin-finish pleated skirt that catches the light as you move. Elastic waistband for all-day comfort.

products.name: Leather Green Bag
products.description: Structured top-handle bag in rich emerald leather. Gold-tone hardware and a detachable crossbody strap.

products.name: Blue High-Heel Shoes
products.description: Pointed-toe stiletto in cobalt blue suede. Slim heel and cushioned footbed for a surprisingly walkable lift.

products.name: Gray Sneakers
products.description: Minimalist low-top sneakers in soft heather gray. Memory-foam insole and a flexible rubber outsole for all-day comfort.

products.name: Classic Leather Shoe
products.description: Timeless derby in full-grain leather. Goodyear-welted construction means these can be resoled for years of wear.

products.name: Suede Loafers
products.description: Slip-on loafers in soft cognac suede. Padded footbed and a flexible sole — equally at home with denim or trousers.

products.name: Cotton Throw Blanket
products.description: Woven cotton throw in warm earth tones. The perfect weight for the sofa — soft, breathable, and gets cozier with every wash.

products.name: Ceramic Vase Set
products.description: Set of three matte-glazed ceramic vases in graduated heights. Minimal silhouettes that suit dried stems or fresh blooms.

products.name: Children's Play Tee
products.description: Soft organic-cotton tee sized for active kids. Reinforced seams and tagless necks for scratch-free comfort.

products.name: Linen Cushion Cover
products.description: Natural linen cushion cover with a hidden zipper. Pairs beautifully with textured throws and woven rugs.
